title: Cenchrus basedowii
taxonomy: Cenchrus basedowii is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Cenchrus, which consists of various species of grasses. The genus Cenchrus is part of the subfamily Chloridoideae. Cenchrus basedowii is native to Australia and is a type of perennial grass.
